title: Filipino-Style Caraway Seed Bread
description: A sweet, indulgent bread infused with the nutty flavor of caraway seeds, perfect for snacking.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Mix the warm water, sour cream, sugar, and eggs in a bowl.
Add the caraway seeds to the mixture and stir to combine.
Spread the mixture evenly over the center of the pastry dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the pastry dough up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the top of the bread with a little bit of water and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown.
Let the bread cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
